CONTENT.Club career: Führich started his career at 1. FC Köln, before joining Borussia Dortmund II in 2019. He signed a four-year contract with VfB Stuttgart on 19 July 2021.On 31 October 2021, he scored his first Bundesliga goal for Stuttgart in a 4–1 defeat against Augsburg. On 3 September 2022, he scored his first goal of the 2022–23 season in a 1–1 draw against his former youth club Schalke 04, followed by Stuttgart's first goal in a 2–2 draw with Bayern Munich on 10 September.On 1 February 2024, Führich extended his contract with VfB Stuttgart until June 2028.
CONTENT.External links: Chris Führich at WorldFootball.netChris Führich at Soccerway
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 18 May 2024As of match played 19 June 2024
CONTENT.International career: In October 2023, Führich received his first call-up to the German senior national team for two friendly matches against the United States and Mexico. He made his national team debut against the United States in a friendly that ended 3–1.Führich was named in Germany's squad for UEFA Euro 2024.

SUMMARY: Chris Jan Führich (born 9 January 1998) is a German professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder or left winger  for Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart and the Germany national team.
